title: Captain America: Brave New World
overview: Sam Wilson, the new Captain America, finds himself in the middle of an international incident when he must uncover the motives behind a nefarious global plot.

title: Paddington in Peru
overview: Paddington returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, who now resides at the Home for Retired Bears. With the Brown family in tow, a thrilling adventure ensues.

title: Dog Man
overview: A faithful police dog and his human cop companion are injured in the line of duty, and a life-saving surgery fuses them into one hybrid hero: Dog Man.

title: Heart Eyes
overview: A masked killer known as the Heart Eyes Killer targets couples in a small city on Valentine's Day, and two coworkers pretending to be a couple must survive the night.

title: The Monkey
overview: Twin brothers discover a cursed toy monkey that brings death to those around them. Decades later, the monkey resurfaces and the brothers must find a way to destroy it.

title: Companion
overview: A woman discovers that she is actually a lifelike AI companion during a weekend trip with friends, and must fight for her survival when things take a dark turn.

title: One of Them Days
overview: Two best friends and roommates must hustle to come up with rent money in one day after discovering one of their boyfriends has blown their funds.

title: Elevation
overview: In a post-apocalyptic world where monsters occupy altitudes below a certain elevation, a father must venture below the safe zone to save his son's life.

title: You're Cordially Invited
overview: Two families discover their weddings have been double-booked at the same venue, leading to an escalating battle of wills to claim the space.

title: The Alto Knights
overview: The true story of two of New York's most notorious organized crime bosses, Frank Costello and Vito Genovese, whose rivalry shaped the American Mafia.
